column1: MetaGo Health: Outbound Sales Script
Objective: Convert website leads into purchasing the initial assessment/blood test plan (1799 or 1000).
Phase 1: Introduction & Context
Hi, am I speaking with [Customer Name]? This is [Your Name] calling from MetaGo Health.
I’m calling regarding the interest you have shown on our website about weight management. Are you looking to lose weight for yourself or for a family member?
Phase 2: Discovery & Reality Check
Great. To give you the right guidance, could you share your current height and weight? (Wait for response. Calculate BMI mentally/using tool)
Okay. Based on those numbers, your BMI is currently (____) which is off-limit. You might be experiencing fatigue or getting tired easily, correct?
This isn’t just about food; it is often about your lifestyle and internal biology.
Phase 3: The Science Pitch (Differentiation)
At MetaGo, we don’t just focus on dieting. We follow a scientifically designed Medical Weight Loss Management plan, based on GLP-1–supported treatment such as Ozempic.
You may be aware that GLP-1 is now globally recognized, including by the WHO, for effective weight management.
May I know if you are familiar with Ozempic?
(If Yes)

Great, At MetaGo, we don’t just reduce weight — we address the root cause. We evaluate key metabolic markers such as Insulin Resistance, Thyroid levels, and Fasting Blood Sugar. An imbalance in these parameters can cause the body to store fat, regardless of how little one eats.
That’s why our approach is safe, scientific, and designed for long-term results.
(If No)

Ozempic is an injectable medical solution that supports the weight-loss journey by working on appetite regulation and increasing metabolism. we offer upto 20% weight loss over the time frame of 6 to 12 months depending on the dosage and medicine also our users have experienced a minimun 10% weight loss

At MetaGo, we don’t just reduce weight — we address the root cause. We evaluate key metabolic markers such as Insulin Resistance, Thyroid levels, and Fasting Blood Sugar. Even a slight imbalance in these parameters can cause the body to store fat, regardless of how little one eats.
That’s why our approach is safe, scientific, and designed for long-term results.
Phase 4: The Solution (GLP-1 & Testing)
Here is how we fix it:
Blood Test: We run a specific blood test on the parameters such as HbA1c, Vitamin D &B12, Thyroid, Lipid, Kidney, Liver, etc. to pinpoint why you are gaining weight.
Doctor & Coach Consultation: Once the test is completed, the specialists reviews your markers and provide with the consultation.

Treatment: Post consultation, we use world-class, FDA-approved support like Ozempic, Wegovy or Mounjaro. This support signals your brain that you aren’t hungry, killing cravings and boosting your metabolism.
Phase 5 (If required): Objection Handling (Side Effects & Rebound Fear)
That is a common misconception. Let me clarify:
On Side Effects: Every medication has minor effects, but so does unhealthy eating (like obesity and lethargy). Our doctors monitor you closely to offset any issues.

On Addiction/Rebound: You won’t be dependent on this forever. The medication is a tool to help you change your lifestyle. It stops the food noise so you can build healthy habits. Once you hit your goal weight, your new lifestyle will keep you there.
Phase 6: Closing (The Ask)
We need to start by understanding your internal body profile.

I recommend we start with the 1799 or 1000 Plan. This covers your complete blood work and the doctor consultation to prescribe the right course. Let’s get your lifestyle change started today. Shall I send you the payment link?
Before proceeding further, wanted to confirm few of things related to your medical history
Any gallstones condition
Family history of thyroid cancer
Any pancreatic condition
Ongoing depression medication
History of Retinoplasty (retina surgery)
Pregnancy or breastfeeding status.
Also Could you help me with your pincode to check the service availability
